title: Tibet
summary: Tibet led by Thupten Gyatso, is a custom civilization by Coiot, with contributions from DarthKyofu, EmeraldRange, and JFD. It was released as part of the CBR Mk2 10th Anniversary and Land of Snows events.

civilization.title: Tibet
civilization.body: Of the many cultures of the world who experience the tumult of political stability Tibet has itself a tumultuous history. Tibet emerged as a unified empire some 1300 years ago, however this soon divided the land into territories poised to be influenced by outside powers; much of that from China. Following the collapse of the Qing dynasty Chinese garrisons were disarmed and exiled from Tibet, causing the government to declare its independence. Then a military strike caused Tibet to become incorporated into the People's Republic of China and later abolishing Tibet's government. This merely summarizes the struggle between a small nation trying to unify itself and a superpower hyphenating its domination.

leader.title: Thupten Gyatso
leader.body: Thupten Gyatso, born in 1876 in Thakpo Langdun, was recognized as the 13th Dalai Lama at a young age. His early years were marked by spiritual training and preparation for leadership in a time of great uncertainty for Tibet. Enthroned in 1879, he would become a pivotal figure in the modernization and preservation of Tibetan sovereignty, guiding his people through periods of foreign intervention and internal reform. His wisdom, compassion, and vision for a strong, independent Tibet would shape the nation's destiny for decades to come.

dawnOfMan.blessing:
Welcome, Thupten Gyatso, the 13th Dalai Lama—enlightened leader, reformer, and steadfast guardian of the Land of Snows. Through wisdom, courage, and boundless compassion, you guided your people through the storms of foreign encroachment and internal strife, preserving the sacred traditions and sovereignty of Tibet. Under your vision, monasteries flourished and education was reformed. You modernized the nation's defenses, fostered unity among the Tibetan people, and stood as a symbol of hope in the face of adversity.
Now, as the winds of change once again sweep across the plateau, your legacy calls out for a leader who can unite faith and progress, strength and compassion. Will you rise to embody the virtues of the Dharma Kings, and lead Tibet to peace, prosperity, and enduring greatness? Can you build a civilization to stand the test of time?
dawnOfMan.introduction: : Welcome to the Land of Snows. May our meeting be guided by wisdom and compassion.
dawnOfMan.defeat: : Though I fall, may peace and understanding one day return to this land.

uniques.name: Zephyr of the Wind Horse
uniques.body: Diplomat Diplomats within another Civilization provide a percentage of the target's Science Science for each tech gap. Allied City-State City-States periodically grant Great Person Great People based on their type.

uniques.name: Kusung
bullets: Gains Strength Strength for each active Research Agreement and Embassy.
Upgrading one starts a short We Love the King Day in your Cities.

uniques.name: Mentsikhang
bullets: +4 Food Food and Production Production per Friendly City-State City-State or Declaration of Friendship, doubled with an Observatory.
Heals friendly Units in your borders for each active Research Agreement.
